input.log_excerpt: AzCon has UU in hand and a counterspell.  At T3 it casts Isochron Scepter (3 mana), tapping all islands.  Opponent (Affinity) untaps and casts a threat with no AzCon counter active.  Repeats T4: AzCon taps out for board action; counterspell stays in hand.

expected.observed_symptom: Control deck taps out on own turn with counterspell in hand, leaves no untapped mana for opponent's priority window
expected.failing_test_rule: control deck holds mana for counter when reactive-only card in hand
